name: Slack
philosophy: An inspired interpretation of Slacc's design language — a workplace messaging brand built on a deep aubergine primary, with cream-lavender hero gradients, blue inline links, and pill CTAs.
trademark_signals: Single aubergine primary reused across CTAs, the featured pricing tier, the footer band, and the wordmark — the brand's chromatic monotheism
Cream-lavender hero canvas ( / ) with diffused pastel-mesh atmospheric gradients and floating UI mockups composited above
Pill buttons at (90px radius) with generous 28–30px horizontal padding — over-padded by SaaS-default standards, deliberately so
Tight negative letter-spacing on display sizes (-0.768px on 64px hero) for editorial-density headlines
Blue inline links — the only non-aubergine chromatic accent in body type
ai_slop_avoided: Don't add a third accent color to the system
Don't render display tiers at default tracking (0)
